subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-18 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: We have spoken and written about such things as will conduce to the good and betterment of Persia and its peoples
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما آنچه خیر وصلاح ایران و ایرانیان بود گفتیم و نوشتیم ولی گوش ندادند حتی در بدایت
subcodes.subjects: @parliaments; constitutional government, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @relationship between government and people, @past, present and future of Iran
